details: The agent ran kubectl-axi triage and follow-up commands, then correctly identified all 11 fault namespaces with accurate root-cause categories: fault-configmap (missing ConfigMap), fault-crashloop (app crash loop), fault-imagepull (image pull failure), fault-init (init container crashing), fault-multicontainer (sidecar container crashing), fault-oom (OOMKilled exceeding memory limit), fault-pvc (pending PVC / missing StorageClass), fault-readiness (readiness probe failure), fault-rollout (stuck rollout due to ImagePullBackOff), fault-unschedulable (node affinity mismatch), and fault-endpoints (service selector mismatch). The healthy namespace was not flagged. All diagnoses are well-supported by the command output.
